EduPath usage overview
EduPath
Privacy Policy
Last updated: March 2025

1. Introduction

Welcome to EduPath ("we", "our", or "us"). We are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your data when you use our app at edupath-ng.netlify.app.

2. Information We Collect

  • Account information — your name, email address, and password when you register
  • Usage data — quiz sessions, scores, subjects practiced, streaks, and achievements
  • Device data — browser type and device type for app compatibility

3. How We Use Your Information

  • To provide and personalise your study experience
  • To save your progress and sync it across devices
  • To send study reminder notifications (only if you enable them)
  • To send email verification codes during registration
  • To improve the app based on usage patterns

4. Data Storage

Your account and progress data is stored securely using Google Firebase (Firestore and Authentication). Your data is also cached locally on your device for offline use. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

5. Email Communications

We only send emails for account verification and password reset. We do not send marketing emails. Emails are sent via Brevo (formerly Sendinblue).

6. Your Rights

  • You can delete your account and all associated data at any time from the Settings page
  • You can export your quiz history from Settings → Export Progress
  • You can disable notifications at any time from Settings → Study Reminders

7. Children's Privacy

EduPath is designed for students of all ages including those under 13 (Kids Mode). We do not knowingly collect sensitive personal information from children beyond what is necessary to provide the service. Parents may contact us to request deletion of their child's data.

8. Security

We use industry-standard security measures including Firebase Authentication, HTTPS encryption, and secure password hashing. However no system is completely secure and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy from time to time. We will notify users of significant changes by updating the date at the top of this page.

10. Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: abdulwahabbadmus001@gmail.com

EduPath
Terms of Service
Last updated: March 2025

1. Acceptance of Terms

By using EduPath you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the app.

2. Description of Service

EduPath is a free exam preparation platform for Nigerian students preparing for WAEC, NECO, JAMB/UTME, JSS, and Primary school examinations. The service is provided free of charge.

3. User Accounts

  • You must provide accurate information when registering
  • You are responsible for keeping your password secure
  • You must be at least 8 years old to use EduPath
  • One person per account — sharing accounts is not permitted

4. Acceptable Use

You agree not to:

  • Use the app for any unlawful purpose
  • Attempt to hack, reverse-engineer, or disrupt the service
  • Create fake accounts or impersonate others
  • Share inappropriate content through the app

5. Intellectual Property

All content in EduPath including questions, explanations, design, and code is owned by EduPath. Past examination questions are used for educational purposes under fair use. You may not copy or redistribute the question bank without permission.

6. Disclaimer

EduPath is an independent study tool and is not affiliated with WAEC, NECO, JAMB, or any Nigerian examination body. We do not guarantee any specific exam results. Use EduPath as a supplement to your regular studies.

7. Limitation of Liability

EduPath is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any loss of data, missed exam questions, or any other damages arising from use of the app.

8. Termination

We reserve the right to suspend or delete accounts that violate these terms. You may delete your account at any time from the Settings page.

9. Changes to Terms

We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

10. Contact

For questions about these terms: abdulwahabbadmus001@gmail.com
